items.description: A-line Wedding Gown with a-line, floor length; designed for 婚禮正儀, 迎賓儀式. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ A字婚紗，特色：a-line、floor length；適用於婚禮正儀、迎賓儀式。風格安全、實穿多變。
